name: folio-packaged-consumer
description: Clean-room consumer that a production Vite build runs against the PACKED @stll/folio-* tarballs (not source). Exercises the real downstream bundler path so a packaging regression — e.g. a worker `new URL(..., import.meta.url)` target that the dist does not ship — fails CI. Driven by scripts/packaged-consumer-build.ts.
